titles.en: Reward of ending a supplication with Maashaa allaah…
Reward of ending a supplication with Maashaa allaah…

segments: حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ سَلَمَهَ بْنِ الْخَطَّابِ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عِمْرَانَ الزَّعْفَرَانِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَا مِنْ رَجُلٍ دَعَا فَخَتَمَ بِقَوْلِ مَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّهَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ إِلَّا أُجِیبَتْ حَاجَتُهُ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ سَلَمَهَ بْنِ الْخَطَّابِ عَنْ إِبْرَاهِیمَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ عِمْرَانَ الزَّعْفَرَانِیِّ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَا مِنْ رَجُلٍ دَعَا فَخَتَمَ بِقَوْلِ مَا شَاءَ اللَّهُ لَا حَوْلَ وَ لَا قُوَّهَ إِلَّا بِاللَّهِ إِلَّا أُجِیبَتْ حَاجَتُهُ.

segments: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Salamah b. al-Khattab from Ibrahim b. Muhammad from ’Imran al-Za’farani from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:   “One who supplicates and says: Maashaa allaahu laa h’aula wa laa quwwata illaa billaah at the end of his supplication, his wish would be fulfilled.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Salamah b. al-Khattab from Ibrahim b. Muhammad from ’Imran al-Za’farani from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said:   “One who supplicates and says: Maashaa allaahu laa h’aula wa laa quwwata illaa billaah at the end of his supplication, his wish would be fulfilled.”
